_publications._publicationTitle: Patient-Derived Tumor Organoid Rings for Histologic Characterization and High-Throughput Screening

_contextSnippet: Transfer all organoids to a Falcon tube...standard embedding, sectioning and staining
details: The open-center ring geometry uniquely enables histopathologic analysis: maxi-rings are collected, embedded in Histogel cassettes, and processed for standard sectioning, H&E staining, and IHC — a capability not feasible with closed-sphere organoid formats
